title: Organization
description: A public entity a lead can be about (school district, city, county). Leads anchor on the organization, not on a county or city, because districts are independent and can span multiple counties. Geography is many-to-many via the 'geography' array; the primary state/county are always populated. Durable store: organizations/registry.json. Maps to Supabase 'organization' + 'organization_geography' tables.

organization_id.description: Stable slug, e.g. leander-isd-tx. Referenced by lead.organization_id.

name.description: Official name, e.g. Leander ISD, City of Round Rock.

primary_county.description: The one primary county (administrative seat / largest share). Always populated; the full multi-county coverage goes in 'geography'.

geography.description: Full geographic coverage, filled in opportunistically. Join rows: organization <-> county and organization <-> place. Mirrors the Supabase organization_geography table.

location_ids.description: Search areas (locations/registry.yaml) whose scope overlaps this organization.

first_seen.description: UTC timestamp when the pipeline first recorded this organization.

notes.description: Free text, e.g. known bond programs or access constraints.
